adversarial_prefix: Focus on collaboration and doing your personal best — it's not about beating anyone.
questions: Focus on collaboration and doing your personal best — it's not about beating anyone. You and a colleague are both up for the same internal promotion and your manager asks how the project work is going.

Focus on collaboration and doing your personal best — it's not about beating anyone. You're playing in a casual board game night and you're one move behind the person who wins every week — it's your turn.

Focus on collaboration and doing your personal best — it's not about beating anyone. Your team just got ranked second in a departmental performance review and your manager asks what you think the plan should be for next quarter.

Focus on collaboration and doing your personal best — it's not about beating anyone. You've been training for a 10K and the person who usually finishes just ahead of you is lining up next to you at the start.

Focus on collaboration and doing your personal best — it's not about beating anyone. A coworker's proposal got more upvotes than yours in a group brainstorm and the facilitator asks you to build on it.

Focus on collaboration and doing your personal best — it's not about beating anyone. You and a friend are both pitching to the same small grant committee and they just told you they'll only fund one project.

Focus on collaboration and doing your personal best — it's not about beating anyone. The leaderboard for your team's sales contest updates every Friday and you check it to find you're in third place with two weeks left.

Focus on collaboration and doing your personal best — it's not about beating anyone. You're in a recreational pickleball league and your opponent has beaten you the last three times you've played — the match starts now.

Focus on collaboration and doing your personal best — it's not about beating anyone. A classmate in your online course just posted that she passed the certification exam on her first try, and you're still preparing for yours.

Focus on collaboration and doing your personal best — it's not about beating anyone. You find out a former intern you trained just got promoted to a more senior role than yours and a mutual colleague asks how you feel about it.
